title: triodia diantha
intro: Triodia diantha, also known as kangaroo grass, is a type of plant native to Australia, belonging to the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in Aboriginal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have medicinal effects. The health benefits of Triodia diantha include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, as well as its ability to protect against infection. Triodia diantha is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used topically in the form of a poultice or ointment to apply directly to affected areas.
